definitions.definition: An external male reproductive organ. It contains a tube called the urethra, which carries semen and urine to the outside of the body.
An intromittent organ in certain biologically male organisms. In placental mammals, this also serves as the organ of urination.
The male organ of urination and copulation.
The male organ of urination and copulation. (NCI)
